info.title: Den API
info.description:
OpenAPI spec for the Den control plane API.

Authentication:
- Use `Authorization: Bearer <session-token>` for user-authenticated routes that require a Den session.
- Use `x-api-key: <den-api-key>` for API-key-authenticated routes that accept organization API keys.
- Public routes like health and documentation do not require authentication.

Swagger tip: use the security schemes in the Authorize dialog to set either `bearerAuth` or `denApiKey` before trying protected endpoints.

tags.name: Organizations
tags.description: Top-level organization creation and context routes.

tags.name: Invitations
tags.description: Invitation preview, acceptance, creation, and cancellation routes.

tags.name: LLM Providers
tags.description: Organization LLM provider catalog, configuration, and access routes.

tags.name: Skills
tags.description: Organization skill authoring and sharing routes.

tags.name: Skill Hubs
tags.description: Organization skill hub management and access routes.

tags.name: Workers
tags.description: Worker lifecycle, billing, and runtime routes.

tags.name: Worker Runtime
tags.description: Worker runtime inspection and upgrade routes.

tags.name: Worker Activity
tags.description: Worker heartbeat and activity reporting routes.

bearerAuth.description: Session token passed as `Authorization: Bearer <session-token>` for user-authenticated Den routes.

denApiKey.name: x-api-key
denApiKey.description: Organization API key passed as the `x-api-key` header for API-key-authenticated Den routes.

get.description: Returns a lightweight health payload for den-api.
Returns a high-level administrative overview of users, sessions, workers, admins, and optional billing data for Den operations.

400.description: The admin overview query parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be an authenticated admin.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user and active session details for the caller.

200.description: Current user and session returned successfully.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to read profile data.

get.description: Lists the organizations visible to the current user and marks which organization is currently active.
Returns the authenticated desktop app restrictions for the caller's active organization.

200.description: Current user desktop config returned successfully.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to read desktop config.

patch.description: Updates organization fields that workspace owners are allowed to change, including the display name, allowed invitation email domains, and desktop app restrictions. The slug is immutable to avoid breaking dashboard URLs.

400.description: The organization update request body was invalid or contained malformed email domains.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to update an organization.

403.description: Only workspace owners can update the organization.

404.description: The organization could not be found.

get.description: Returns the active organization from the current session, including its owner, the current member record, and their team memberships.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to load organization context.

404.description: The organization could not be found.

get.description: Returns invitation preview details so a user can inspect an organization invite before accepting it.

400.description: The invitation preview query parameters were invalid.

404.description: The invitation could not be found.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Den TypeID with 'inv_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

post.description: Accepts an organization invitation for the current signed-in user and switches their active organization to the accepted workspace.

400.description: The invitation acceptance request body was invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to accept an invitation.

403.description: API keys cannot accept organization invitations.

404.description: The invitation could not be found.

409.description: The current account email is not allowed to join this organization.

id.description: Den TypeID with 'inv_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

get.description: Returns the API keys that belong to the selected organization.

400.description: Invalid request

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Only workspace owners and admins can list API keys.

404.description: Organization not found

post.description: Creates or refreshes a pending organization invitation for an email address and sends the invite email. Returns 502 when the invitation row is persisted but the email provider (Loops) failed to send; the client should surface the error and give the user a retry affordance.

400.description: The invitation request body or path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to invite organization members.

403.description: Only workspace owners and admins can create or resend invitations.

404.description: The organization could not be found.

409.description: The email address is outside this workspace's allowed domains.

502.description: The invitation was saved but the email provider (Loops) rejected or failed to deliver it. Retry by submitting the same email again.

post.description: Cancels a pending organization invitation so the invite link can no longer be used.

400.description: The invitation cancellation path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to cancel invitations.

403.description: Only workspace owners and admins can cancel invitations.

404.description: The invitation or organization could not be found.

parameters.name: invitationId
parameters.description: Den TypeID with 'inv_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

get.description: Lists the provider catalog from models.dev so an organization can choose which LLM providers to configure.

400.description: The provider catalog path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to browse the provider catalog.

502.description: The external provider catalog was unavailable.

get.description: Returns the full models.dev catalog record for one provider, including its config template and model list.

400.description: The provider catalog path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to inspect provider catalog entries.

404.description: The requested provider catalog entry could not be found.

502.description: The external provider catalog was unavailable.

200.description: Accessible organization LLM providers returned successfully.

400.description: The provider list path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to list organization LLM providers.

post.description: Creates a new organization-scoped LLM provider from either a models.dev provider template or a pasted custom configuration.

400.description: The provider creation request was invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to create organization LLM providers.

404.description: A referenced provider, model, member, or team could not be found.

items.description: Den TypeID with 'om_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.
Den TypeID with 'tem_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

400.description: The provider connect path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to connect to an organization LLM provider.

403.description: Only members with access grants, the provider creator, or workspace admins can connect to this provider.

404.description: The provider could not be found.

parameters.name: llmProviderId
parameters.description: Den TypeID with 'lpr_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

400.description: The provider update request was invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to update organization LLM providers.

403.description: Only the provider creator or a workspace admin can update providers.

404.description: The provider or a referenced resource could not be found.

204.description: Organization LLM provider access removed successfully.

400.description: The provider access deletion path parameters were invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to manage provider access.

403.description: Only the provider creator or a workspace admin can manage provider access.

404.description: The provider or access grant could not be found.

409.description: The request tried to remove a protected provider access entry.

parameters.name: llmProviderId
parameters.description: Den TypeID with 'lpr_' prefix and a 26-character base32 suffix.

404.description: The member or organization could not be found.

post.description: Builds a GitHub App install redirect URL for the current organization.

400.description: The GitHub install request was invalid.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to connect GitHub.

post.description: Completes a GitHub App installation for the current organization and returns visible repositories.

401.description: The caller must be signed in to complete GitHub connection.

403.description: The caller lacks permission to complete GitHub connection.
